title: Packaged Clinical Drugs
description: This section contains all the packaged Clinical Drug classes, abstract and real.

bindings.title: Packaged Clinical drugs
bindings.note:
Packaged Clinical Drugs, with ingredients, form, strength and package details, but no brand.
